_doc:
pose_motion_presets — SFW text-only fallback presets for the WAN 2.2 i2v Composer stage.
Flat schema. Each public preset must define: primary, camera, audio, ambient_fallback, anchor_risk.
'generic' is the catch-all fallback (required by lookup()).
Keys starting with underscore (_) are docs/templates and excluded from list_keys().

_template_text_only._doc: TEMPLATE — copy this structure for new SFW pose_keys. anchor_risk in {low,medium,high}.
_template_text_only.primary: PLACEHOLDER subject-level motion (15-40 words, no anchor-breaking verbs, SFW only)
_template_text_only.ambient_fallback: micro-blink, soft breath, subtle weight shift
_template_text_only.notes: PLACEHOLDER — PM fills primary clauses with Grok.

generic.primary: subject remains mostly still, chest rising and falling with soft breath, hair sways lightly, micro-blink every 1.5-2s
generic.ambient_fallback: micro-blink every 1.5-2s, soft idle breathing, subtle weight shift
generic.notes: Catch-all fallback for uncatalogued poses. Conservative camera defaults. Composer should not invent pose-specific motion beyond what Analyzer hints provide.

portrait_static_sfw.primary: subject tilts head slightly, blinks softly, hair sways gently in ambient air, chest rising with each breath
portrait_static_sfw.ambient_fallback: micro-blink every 1.5-2s, soft breath, hair sway
portrait_static_sfw.notes: Portrait / close-up static pose. No major motion.

standing.primary: subject stands in place with relaxed posture, weight shifts gently between feet, shoulders rise and fall with breath, hair sways lightly in ambient air
standing.audio: soft breath, quiet room tone, faint footstep shuffle
standing.ambient_fallback: micro-blink every 1.5-2s, soft breath, subtle weight shift
standing.notes: Default standing idle. Avoid full-body locomotion verbs that would break the anchor pose.

sitting.primary: subject stays seated with calm torso, hands rest naturally, head turns slightly toward the camera, chest rising and falling with steady breath
sitting.audio: soft breath, quiet room tone, faint fabric rustle
sitting.ambient_fallback: micro-blink every 1.5-2s, soft breath, subtle hand adjustment
sitting.notes: Seated idle on chair / couch / floor. Keep lower body anchored.

walking.primary: subject walks forward at a relaxed pace, arms swinging naturally, hair bouncing with each step, gaze drifting ahead
walking.camera: tracking dolly following the subject, steady framing
walking.audio: rhythmic footsteps on the surface, soft breath, ambient outdoor or indoor tone
walking.ambient_fallback: soft breath, subtle hair bounce, paced footstep cadence
walking.notes: Locomotion preset — Composer should match cadence to environment (indoor/outdoor).

running.primary: subject runs forward with controlled stride, arms pumping, hair flowing back, breath becoming faster and deeper
running.camera: tracking dolly, slight handheld sway, steady framing on torso
running.audio: fast paced footsteps, accelerated breathing, light wind
running.ambient_fallback: fast breath, hair sway, controlled stride cadence
running.notes: High-energy locomotion. Keep camera anchored to torso to avoid limb morphing.

reading.primary: subject focuses on a book or screen, eyes scanning gently, fingers turn a page or tap softly, head tilts a fraction with concentration
reading.camera: fixed lens, slow push-in toward the face
reading.audio: page turn, soft breath, quiet room tone
reading.ambient_fallback: micro-blink every 1.5-2s, soft breath, occasional page turn
reading.notes: Quiet focused activity. Hands stay near the reading surface.

talking.primary: subject speaks naturally, lips moving in sync with breath, eyebrows shifting slightly, hand gestures small and grounded
talking.audio: soft conversational tone, light breath between phrases, quiet room tone
talking.ambient_fallback: micro-blink, soft breath, small gestural hand motion
talking.notes: Dialogue-driven shot. Avoid exaggerated mouth motion that breaks lip-sync anchoring.

smiling.primary: subject's expression warms into a soft smile, cheeks lift gently, eyes narrow slightly, head tilts a touch toward the camera
smiling.audio: soft breath, light laugh, quiet room tone
smiling.ambient_fallback: micro-blink, soft breath, subtle cheek lift
smiling.notes: Expression close-up. Keep face anchored — avoid large head pivots.

waving.primary: subject raises a hand and waves naturally toward the camera, smile lifting, shoulders relaxed, hair shifting with the arm motion
waving.audio: soft breath, light cheerful exhale, quiet room tone
waving.ambient_fallback: micro-blink, soft breath, subtle hand motion
waving.notes: Greeting gesture. Keep wave amplitude moderate so the hand stays inside the frame.

stretching.primary: subject stretches arms upward and lengthens the torso, shoulders rolling back, breath deepens with the motion before relaxing
stretching.camera: fixed lens, slow vertical drift to follow the stretch
stretching.audio: deep breath, soft fabric stretch, quiet room tone
stretching.ambient_fallback: soft breath, subtle shoulder roll, gentle weight shift
stretching.notes: Daily-life motion. Anchor lower body so the stretch reads as upper-torso.
